title: viola commersonii
intro: Viola commersonii, also known as the New Zealand viola or Commerson's pansy, is a species of flowering plant in the pansy family (Violaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola commersonii include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Viola commersonii often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
